/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/global/global.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/global/glfw/glfw.cpp.o -o engine  libs/glfw-master/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
